name: Limited Ingredient
description: Limited ingredient diets (LID) are formulated with a minimal number of protein and carbohydrate sources, making it easier to identify and eliminate food allergens. Typically feature a single novel protein and one carbohydrate source.
suitable_for: dogs with food allergies or intolerances
dogs with chronic itching or hot spots
benefits: Reduces chance of triggering food sensitivities
Often uses novel proteins dogs haven't been exposed to
Good for dogs with multiple ingredient sensitivities
risks: May not be nutritionally complete if poorly formulated
Novel proteins can become sensitising over time
